author: Guy of Mont Rocher (or Rother)(†1333)
title: Manipulus curatorum sacerdotum secundum ordinem septem sacramentorum perbreviter complectens
editions: cf. L. F. Hain, Repertorium Bibliographicum #8166 (Hain, vol. 1, p. 539; Hain- Copinger, pt. 1, p. 242; D. Reichling, Appendices ad Hainii-Copingeri Repertorium Bibliographicum, fasc. 2, p. 183).
translations: Anne T. Thayer, Handbook for Curates: A Late Medieval Manual on Pastoral Ministry (CUA Press, 2011)
